confirmClearMessage: Are you sure you want to clear all files?
aboutText:
This application allows you to annotate and inspect objects dynamically.

 Written by: University of Florida Students. 

Fall 2025 Contributors:Ethan Mitchell,Megan Mendez, Santiago Roa, Mia Camacho
instructionsText:
Use the toolbar to create annotations. Click an annotation to edit its properties. 'File' dropdown will allow you to load images, clear images, and export

Models holds the AI models for time image processing. 'Preprocess' button will process all tiles on selected image. 

Pan Tool: allows your to move image around and have zoom capabilites. 

 Selector Tool: selects annoatations and other items on screeen. 

Rectangle Tool: creates new annotations by hand.
